ses.receiptfilter.ipfilter.Cidr.Description: A single IP address or a range of IP addresses to block or allow, specified in Classless Inter-Domain Routing (CIDR) notation. An example of a single email address is 10.0.0.1. An example of a range of IP addresses is 10.0.0.1/24. For more information about CIDR notation, see [RFC 2317](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc2317).

ses.receiptfilter.ipfilter.Policy.Description: Indicates whether to block or allow incoming mail from the specified IP addresses.
